solid #bbb;border-radius:3px;display:flex;text-align:left}.vue-tel-input.disabled .dropdown,.vue-tel-input.disabled .selection,.vue-tel-input.disabled input{cursor:no-drop}.vue-tel-input:focus-within{border-color:#66afe9;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 1px #00000013,0 0 8px #66afe999}.vti__dropdown{align-content:center;cursor:pointer;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:7px;position:relative}.vti__dropdown.show{max-height:300px;overflow:scroll}.vti__dropdown.disabled,.vti__dropdown.open{background-color:#f3f3f3}.vti__dropdown.disabled{cursor:no-drop;outline:none}.vti__dropdown:hover{background-color:#f3f3f3}.vti__selection{align-items:center;display:flex;font-size:.8em}.vti__selection .vti__country-code{color:#666}.vti__flag{margin-left:5px;margin-right:5px}.vti__dropdown-list{background-color:#fff;border:1px solid #ccc;left:-1px;list-style:none;margin:0;max-height:200px;overflow-y:scroll;padding:0;position:absolute;text-align:left;width:390px;z-index:1}.vti__dropdown-list.below{top:33px}.vti__dropdown-list.above{bottom:100%;top:auto}.vti__dropdown-arrow{color:#666;display:inline-block;transform:scaleY(.5)}.vti__dropdown-item{cursor:pointer;padding:4px 15px}.vti__dropdown-item.highlighted{background-color:#f3f3f3}.vti__dropdown-item.last-preferred{border-bottom:1px solid #cacaca}.vti__dropdown-item .vti__flag{display:inline-block;margin-right:5px}.vti__input{border:none;border-radius:0 2px 2px 0;outline:none;padding-left:7px;width:100%}.vti__search_box{border:1px solid #ccc;margin:2px;padding:7px;width:94%}</style>
<style>:lang(en){font-family:Poppins,sans-serif}:lang(zh),:lang(zh-CN),:lang(zh-hans){font-family:MiSans,sans-serif}:lang(ja){font-family:Hiragino Sans,Meiryo,MS PGothic,sans-serif}:lang(vi){font-family:BeVietnamPro,sans-serif}:lang(ko){font-family:Malgun Gothic,Apple SD Gothic Neo,sans-serif}:lang(ar){font-family:Tahoma,Arial,sans-serif}:lang(ru){font-family:Roboto,Arial,sans-serif;letter-spacing:.5px}:lang(en-IN),:lang(en-in),:lang(in){font-family:Poppins,sans-serif}</style>

<style>.message[data-v-80ad47e2]{align-items:center;background:#fff;border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px #0000001a;display:flex;left:50%;padding:10px 20px;position:fixed;transform:translate(-50%);z-index:999999999}.message--success[data-v-80ad47e2]{background-color:#f0f9eb;color:#67c23a}.message--warning[data-v-80ad47e2]{background-color:#fdf6ec;color:#e6a23c}.message--error[data-v-80ad47e2]{background-color:#fef0f0;color:#f56c6c}.message--info[data-v-80ad47e2]{background-color:#f4f4f5;color:#909399}.message-icon[data-v-80ad47e2]{font-style:normal;margin-right:10px}.message-content[data-v-80ad47e2]{font-size:14px}.message-close[data-v-80ad47e2]{cursor:pointer;font-style:normal;margin-left:10px}.message-close[data-v-80ad47e2]:hover{opacity:.7}.message-fade-enter-active[data-v-80ad47e2],.message-fade-leave-active[data-v-80ad47e2]{transition:all .4s ease-in-out}.message-fade-enter-from[data-v-80ad47e2]{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-20px)}.message-fade-leave-to[data-v-80ad47e2]{opacity:0;transform:translate(100%,-20px)}.message-fade-enter-to[data-v-80ad47e2],.message-fade-leave-from[data-v-80ad47e2]{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%)}</style>
<style>.india-modal-overlay[data-v-5fb20316]{align-items:center;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(4px);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);background:#0006;display:flex;height:100%;justify-content:center;left:0;padding:20px;position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:999999999}.india-modal[data-v-5fb20316]{background:#fff;border-radius:24px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px #0000001f;max-width:520px;padding:32px 40px 28px;width:100%}.india-modal-title[data-v-5fb20316]{color:#001489;font-size:18px;font-style:normal;font-weight:900;line-height:20px;text-align:center}.india-modal-desc[data-v-5fb20316]{color:#000850;font-size:12px;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:18px;margin-top:5px;padding-bottom:32px;text-align:center}.india-modal-divider[data-v-5fb20316]{background:#ddd;height:1px;margin-bottom:24px}.india-modal-actions[data-v-5fb20316]{align-items:center;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;justify-content:center}.india-btn[data-v-5fb20316]{border-radius:999px;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;padding:12px 24px;transition:opacity .2s}.india-btn[data-v-5fb20316]:hover{opacity:.9}.india-btn.primary[data-v-5fb20316]{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#001489,#0a7aff);border:none;border-radius:100px;color:#fff}.india-btn.outline[data-v-5fb20316]{border:2px solid #001489;border-radius:100px;box-sizing:border-box;color:#1e3a8a;padding:8px 20px}</style>
<style>html{scroll-behavior:smooth;scroll-padding-top:120px}.layout-enter-active,.layout-leave-active{transition:all .4s}.layout-enter-from,.layout-leave-to{filter:grayscale(1)}.navbar-bg{background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 4px #0000000d;height:173px;position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:9999999}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.navbar-bg{height:70px}}.navbar-bg-box{height:173px;position:relative;z-index:999999}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.navbar-bg-box{height:70px}}.no-bred{height:120px}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.no-bred{height:70px}}.navbar-a-box{height:223px}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.navbar-a-box{height:70px}}.navbar-bg-a{background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 4px #0000000d;height:223px;position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:1999}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.navbar-bg-a{height:70px}}.navbar-white-box{height:200px}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.navbar-white-box{height:70px}}.navbar-bg-white{height:200px;position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:1999}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.navbar-bg-white{height:70px}}.grecaptcha-badge{display:none!important}</style>
<style>.modal-enter-active[data-v-8a3e1d4c],.modal-leave-active[data-v-8a3e1d4c]{transition:opacity .3s ease}.modal-enter-from[data-v-8a3e1d4c],.modal-leave-to[data-v-8a3e1d4c]{opacity:0}.slide-enter-active[data-v-8a3e1d4c],.slide-leave-active[data-v-8a3e1d4c]{transition:all .3s ease}.slide-enter-from[data-v-8a3e1d4c],.slide-leave-to[data-v-8a3e1d4c]{opacity:0;transform:translate(20px)}.menu-content[data-v-8a3e1d4c]::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}.menu-content[data-v-8a3e1d4c]::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#f1f1f1}.menu-content[data-v-8a3e1d4c]::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#888;border-radius:2px}.menu-content[data-v-8a3e1d4c]::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:#555}.menu-item[data-v-8a3e1d4c]{border-bottom:1px solid #eee}.menu-item[data-v-8a3e1d4c]:last-child{border-bottom:none}.submenu[data-v-8a3e1d4c]{border-top:1px solid #eee}.menu-item a[data-v-8a3e1d4c]:hover{text-decoration:none}.bg-gradient-to-r[data-v-8a3e1d4c]:hover{opacity:.9}</style>

<style>.scroll-to-top[data-v-a3a8e033]{align-items:center;background-color:#d6d6d6;border-radius:50%;bottom:130px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px #00000026;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;height:50px;justify-content:center;position:fixed;right:25px;transition:all .3s ease;width:50px;z-index:9999}.scroll-to-top[data-v-a3a8e033]:hover{background-color:#001489;box-shadow:0 4px 12px #0003;transform:translateY(-3px)}.scroll-to-top:hover svg[data-v-a3a8e033]{stroke:#fff}.scroll-to-top[data-v-a3a8e033]:active{transform:translateY(-1px)}.scroll-to-top svg[data-v-a3a8e033]{height:24px;width:24px;stroke:#222}.scroll-to-top .tooltip[data-v-a3a8e033]{background-color:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px #00000026;color:#333;font-size:14px;font-weight:400;padding:8px 12px;pointer-events:none;position:absolute;right:calc(100% + 12px);top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);white-space:nowrap;z-index:10000}.scroll-to-top .tooltip[data-v-a3a8e033]:after{border:6px solid transparent;border-left-color:#fff;content:"";left:100%;position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%)}@media screen and (width <= 767px){.scroll-to-top[data-v-a3a8e033]{bottom:90px;height:45px;right:25px;width:45px}.scroll-to-top svg[data-v-a3a8e033]{height:20px;width:20px}.scroll-to-top .tooltip[data-v-a3a8e033]{font-size:12px;padding:6px 10px;right:calc(100% + 10px)}}.fade-enter-active[data-v-a3a8e033],.fade-leave-active[data-v-a3a8e033]{transition:opacity .3s ease,transform .3s ease}.fade-enter-from[data-v-a3a8e033],.fade-leave-to[data-v-a3a8e033]{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}.tooltip-fade-enter-active[data-v-a3a8e033]{transition:opacity .2s ease,transform .2s ease}.tooltip-fade-leave-active[data-v-a3a8e033]{transition:opacity .15s ease,transform .15s ease}.tooltip-fade-enter-from[data-v-a3a8e033],.tooltip-fade-leave-to[data-v-a3a8e033]{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-50%) translate(-8px)}</style>

https://tmgm-static.oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com/image/index/share-icon6-active.webp 2x" class="active" src="https://tmgm-static.oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com/image/index/share-icon6-active.webp" data-v-ddd704c9></div></div></div></div><div class="summary-wrap" data-v-b8dc6f63><p class="text" style="white-space:pre-line;margin-bottom:0;" data-v-b8dc6f63>Trading gold as XAUUSD in Forex requires an understanding of how XAUUSD works, a regulated broker, and a funded account. To get from account setup to your first live trade, follow these 9 steps.

Start by understanding what XAUUSD trading is and what drives its price. Choose a regulated trading platform, open a funded account, and locate XAUUSD as your instrument.

From there, identify the best time to trade, build a trading plan, and place your trade in the correct direction.

Once your trade is live, monitor your position and manage your risk until you are ready to close it.</p></div><!----><!----></div></div><div class="content" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="left" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="article-content-wrap" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="html fr-view" data-v-b8dc6f63><div style="font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;"><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">1. Understand XAUUSD trading</span></h2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">XAUUSD trading is the <a href="/en/academy/trading-academy/what-is-gold-trading" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;">buying and selling of gold</a> priced in US dollars on the Forex market. XAU is the ISO currency code for gold. USD is the ISO currency code for the US dollar. The price of XAUUSD tells you how many US dollars it costs to buy one troy ounce of gold.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">When you trade XAUUSD, you are speculating on whether the price of gold will rise or fall against the US dollar. You do not own or receive any gold.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">The price of XAUUSD moves based on 7 main factors:</span></p><ol style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Supply and demand</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Inflation expectations</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Interest rates and real yields</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Economic uncertainty</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">US dollar strength</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Central bank activity</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Market sentiment and speculative positioning</span></p></li></ol><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Understanding what drives XAUUSD price movements is the foundation of every trading decision in this guide. Your entry timing, trade direction, and risk controls all depend on your ability to read which factors are active in the market at any given time.</span></p><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">2. Pick a XAUUSD trading platform</span></h2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">A XAUUSD trading platform is a regulated broker that gives you access to the Forex market, where you can view the XAUUSD price and execute gold trades.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Choose a XAUUSD trading platform based on 5 criteria:</span></p><ol style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Regulation</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">XAUUSD spread</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Leverage offered</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">MT4/MT5 availability</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Demo account access</span></p></li></ol><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">1. Regulation</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Use a platform regulated by a recognised financial authority such as ASIC, FCA, or CySEC, which ensures your funds are held to a legal standard and trading conditions are subject to oversight.</span></p><div style="margin: 25px 0; border: 1px dashed #ffc107; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 8px; background-color: #fffbf0;"><div style="margin-top: 0; color: #856404; display: flex; align-items: center;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">TMGM is regulated by ASIC (Australian Securities and Investments Commission)</span></div><div style="color: #555;"><p style="margin: 0 0 5px 0; font-size: 12pt;">TMGM holds client funds in segregated accounts, maintains adequate capital reserves, and complies with strict reporting obligations. Your deposited funds cannot be used for the platform&#39;s own operations and remain protected if the platform faces financial difficulty.</p></div></div><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">2. XAUUSD spread</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Check the platform&#39;s advertised spread for XAUUSD before signing up, as a lower spread reduces your cost per trade.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">3. Activate your account</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Once verified and funded, your account is live and you can access XAUUSD on your platform</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Most brokers complete the verification process within 24 hours.</span></p><div style="margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center;"><p style="font-size: 1.1em; color: #333; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 20px;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Ready to start trading XAUUSD?</span></p><a href="https://portal.tmgm.com/register" style="display: inline-block; background-color: #2969b0; color: #ffffff; padding: 15px 40px; font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 50px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(41, 105, 176, 0.4); transition: transform 0.2s;" target="_blank">Open a XAUUSD trading account</a><p style="margin-top: 15px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #888;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Or <a href="https://portal.tmgm.com/register?register_type=demo" style="color: #2969b0; text-decoration: underline;" target="_blank">practice with a free demo account</a> before trading live.</span></p></div><div style="margin: 1.5rem 0 3rem 0; border-top: 1px solid #eee; padding-top: 20px; font-size: 0.85em; color: #999; text-align: center;">TMGM is regulated by ASIC, VFSC, FSA, and FSC. Client funds are held in segregated accounts.</div><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">4. XAUUSD as your instrument means choosing gold priced in US dollars as the market you want to trade on your broker&#39;s platform.</span></p><p dir="ltr" Confirm the instrument</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Select XAUUSD from the results and confirm it is quoted in US dollars per troy ounce</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">3. Some platforms label it as XAU/USD, Gold, or GOLD.USD. Search for &ldquo;gold&rdquo; instead if a search for &quot;XAUUSD&quot; returns no results.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Once XAUUSD is open on your chart, you are ready to research the best time to place your trade.</span></p><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">5. Identify the best XAUUSD trading time</span></h2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">The <a href="/en/academy/trading-academy/gold-trading-hours" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;">best time to trade XAUUSD</a> is between 13:00 and 17:00 UTC (08:00 to 12:00 EST). This is the overlap between the London and New York trading sessions, where gold trading volume and price volatility are at their highest. This four-hour window produces the tightest spreads and the largest price moves of the trading day, making it the most practical window for executing XAUUSD trades.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">XAUUSD trades 24 hours a day, five days a week. Activity levels vary across 3 main sessions, listed by importance to XAUUSD traders:</span></p><ol style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">London session</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">New York session</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Asian session</span></p></li></ol><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">1. London session (08:00 to 17:00 UTC / 03:00 to 12:00 EST)</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Activity increases as European traders enter the market, widening price ranges and increasing liquidity</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">2. New York session (13:00 to 22:00 UTC / 08:00 to 17:00 EST)</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>The most active session for XAUUSD, driven by US economic data releases and high institutional participation</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">3. Asian session (00:00 to 09:00 UTC / 19:00 to 04:00 EST)</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>The quietest period for XAUUSD, with lower volume and smaller price movements</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">XAUUSD is also sensitive to scheduled US economic releases, including the Non-Farm Payrolls report, CPI data, and Federal Reserve interest rate decisions. These events can cause sharp price movements outside of the standard overlap window and should be checked on an economic calendar before placing a trade.</span></p><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">6. Build your XAUUSD trading plan</span></h2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">A XAUUSD trading plan is a written set of rules that defines how you enter, manage, and exit gold trades while controlling risk and measuring performance over time.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">A structured XAUUSD trading plan removes emotional decision-making, improves discipline, and helps you maintain capital through consistent execution.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, Risk management rules</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Set your maximum risk per trade, position sizing formula, and total account risk exposure. A widely accepted guideline is to risk no more than 1&ndash;2% of your account balance per trade. On a $100 account, that means a maximum of $1&ndash;$2 at risk per trade. On a $1,000 account, that ceiling rises to $10&ndash;$20 per trade</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">7. a XAUUSD trade means placing a buy or sell order on gold priced in US dollars through your broker&#39;s platform.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">There are 2 directions you can trade XAUUSD:</span></p><ul style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:disc;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Buy (long)<br></span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">You buy XAUUSD if you expect the price of gold to rise against the US dollar.</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:disc;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" (short)</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>You sell XAUUSD if you expect the price of gold to fall against the US dollar.</span></p></li></ul><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Follow Open the order panel</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>From your XAUUSD chart, click the buy or sell button to open the order entry window.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">2. Choose your order type</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Select a market order to execute at the current price, or a limit order to execute at a specific price you set in advance.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">3. Set your position size</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Enter your lot size based on the risk management rules in your trading pla</span><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family:Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">n. <span style="font-family:Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">For example, with 1:10 leverage, a $200 margin controls a $2,000 gold position. The larger your position size, the greater your exposure to price movements in both directions.</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">4. Set your stop-loss and take-profit levels</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Enter your stop-loss and take-profit prices before confirming the trade.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">5. Confirm the order</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Review the order details and submit. Your trade is now live and will appear in your open positions.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Once the order is confirmed, your XAUUSD trade is active and will gain or lose value as the gold price moves.</span></p><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">8. your XAUUSD trade means monitoring your open position and adjusting your risk controls as the gold price moves.</span></p><p dir="ltr" sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Watch economic events</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Avoid overtrading</span></p></li></ol><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">1. Monitor the price</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Track the XAUUSD price against your entry point, stop-loss, and take-profit levels. Avoid making impulsive adjustments outside of your trading plan</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">2. Adjust your stop-loss<br></span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Move your stop-loss in the direction of the trade if the price moves in your favour. This locks in profit and reduces the risk of a winning trade turning into a loss</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">3. Watch economic events<br></span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Check your economic calendar for scheduled US data releases that can cause sharp XAUUSD price movements. High-impact events such as CPI releases and Federal Reserve decisions can shift gold prices quickly</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">4. Avoid overtrading<br></span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Do not open additional XAUUSD positions to recover losses from an open trade. Each trade should meet the entry criteria in your trading plan independently</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Managing a XAUUSD trade is not the same as interfering with it. If the trade is within your plan parameters, no action is required until your stop-loss or take-profit level is reached.</span></p><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span style="font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">9. Close your XAUUSD trade</span></h2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Closing your XAUUSD trade means exiting your open position and settling the profit or loss from that trade in your account.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">There are 3 ways to close a XAUUSD trade:</span></p><ol style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Take-profit trigger</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Stop-loss trigger</span></p></li><li dir="ltr" style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Manual close</span></p></li></ol><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">1. Take-profit trigger</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Your trade closes automatically when the price reaches the take-profit level you set at entry</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">2. Stop-loss trigger</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>Your trade closes automatically when the price reaches your stop-loss level, limiting your loss on that trade</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">3. Manual close</span><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"><br>You close the trade yourself through the order panel before either level is reached</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">After closing a XAUUSD trade, record the trade details in your trading journal. Note the entry price, exit price, position size, and outcome. This supports the performance review process in your trading plan and helps identify patterns in your execution over time.</span></p><div style="margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center;"><p style="font-size: 1.1em; color: #333; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 20px;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Trade XAUUSD with TMGM worry-free.</span></p><a href="https://portal.tmgm.com/register" style="display: inline-block; background-color: #2969b0; color: #ffffff; padding: 15px 40px; font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 50px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(41, 105, 176, 0.4); transition: transform 0.2s;" target="_blank">Open an XAUUSD trading account</a><p style="margin-top: 15px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #888;"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Or <a href="https://portal.tmgm.com/register?register_type=demo" style="color: #2969b0; text-decoration: underline;" target="_blank">try our free demo account</a> (no deposit required).</span></p></div><div style="margin: 1.5rem 0 3rem 0; border-top: 1px solid #eee; padding-top: 20px; font-size: 0.85em; color: #999; text-align: center;">TMGM is regulated by ASIC, VFSC, FSA, and FSC. Client funds are held in segregated accounts.</div></div></div></div></div><div class="right" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="list-box" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="nav-list" data-v-b8dc6f63><button class="open-account-btn" data-v-b8dc6f63>Start Trading Now</button></div></div></div><div class="faq" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="faq-section" data-v-b8dc6f63 data-v-a42299f2><h2 class="title" data-v-a42299f2>XAUUSD Trading FAQs<!----></h2><div class="m-title" data-v-a42299f2><span data-v-a42299f2></span></div><div class="faq-list" data-v-a42299f2><!--[--><div data-v-a42299f2><div style="" class="faq-item" data-v-a42299f2><div class="question" data-v-a42299f2><h3 data-v-a42299f2>What is XAUUSD in Forex?</h3><div class="icon" data-v-a42299f2>+</div></div><div class="answer" style="display:none;" data-v-a42299f2><div class="text" data-v-a42299f2></div><!----><div class="html" data-v-a42299f2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:10pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">XAUUSD is the Forex market symbol for spot gold priced in US dollars. It is the label used to identify and trade the live gold spot rate against the US dollar on the foreign exchange market, quoted as US dollars per troy ounce.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:10pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">In <a href="/en/academy/trading-academy/what-is-forex-trading" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;">Forex trading</a>, XAUUSD sits alongside major currency pairs such as EURUSD and GBPUSD, following the same order types, margin requirements, and trade execution rules. It is one of the most actively traded instruments in the Forex market, valued for its liquidity and sensitivity to global economic events.</span></p></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div></div></div><div data-v-a42299f2><div style="" class="faq-item" data-v-a42299f2><div class="question" data-v-a42299f2><h3 data-v-a42299f2>Why is gold traded as a currency pair in Forex?</h3><div class="icon" data-v-a42299f2>+</div></div><div class="answer" style="display:none;" data-v-a42299f2><div class="text" data-v-a42299f2></div><!----><div class="html" data-v-a42299f2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Gold is traded as a currency pair in Forex because it is priced globally in US dollars. Since gold has a direct exchange rate with the dollar, Forex platforms quote it the same way they quote one currency against another.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">This structure has 3 practical reasons:</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">1. Global dollar pricing</span><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br>Gold is bought and sold in US dollars across international markets, making the dollar the natural base for quoting its price</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">2. Historical classification</span><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br>Gold held monetary status for most of the 20th century under the Bretton Woods system, where major currencies were pegged to its value. That relationship established gold as a currency-like asset, a classification that carried into modern Forex markets</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">3. Standardised trading infrastructure</span><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br>Quoting gold as a currency pair allows brokers to apply the same margin, leverage, and order execution rules used for all other Forex instruments, simplifying access for traders</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Trading gold as a currency pair also means its price is directly affected by US dollar strength. When the dollar strengthens, XAUUSD falls. When the dollar weakens, XAUUSD rises. This inverse relationship is a defining characteristic of gold in the Forex market.</span></p></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div></div></div><div data-v-a42299f2><div style="" class="faq-item" data-v-a42299f2><div class="question" data-v-a42299f2><h3 data-v-a42299f2>How much is 1 XAUUSD?</h3><div class="icon" data-v-a42299f2>+</div></div><div class="answer" style="display:none;" data-v-a42299f2><div class="text" data-v-a42299f2></div><!----><div class="html" data-v-a42299f2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">1 XAUUSD represents the price of one troy ounce of gold in US dollars. The exact price changes continuously during market hours as gold is bought and sold globally.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">The price of XAUUSD is influenced by US dollar strength, interest rates, and global demand for gold. Tracking the <a href="/en/trading/instrument/xauusd" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;">live gold spot price</a> helps you identify where the market is trading relative to recent highs and lows before placing a trade.</span></p></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div></div></div><div data-v-a42299f2><div style="" class="faq-item" data-v-a42299f2><div class="question" data-v-a42299f2><h3 data-v-a42299f2>Can I trade XAUUSD with $100?</h3><div class="icon" data-v-a42299f2>+</div></div><div class="answer" style="display:none;" data-v-a42299f2><div class="text" data-v-a42299f2></div><!----><div class="html" data-v-a42299f2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Yes, you can trade XAUUSD with $100. Many XAUUSD trading platforms set minimum deposit requirements at or below $100, giving you access to the gold market with a small amount of starting capital.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Once your account is funded, leverage allows your $100 deposit to control a XAUUSD position larger than your account balance. For example, with 1:50 leverage, a $100 deposit controls a $5,000 gold position. This means a small amount of capital can generate meaningful exposure to gold price movements.</span></p></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div></div></div><div data-v-a42299f2><div style="" class="faq-item" data-v-a42299f2><div class="question" data-v-a42299f2><h3 data-v-a42299f2>Is trading XAUUSD risky?</h3><div class="icon" data-v-a42299f2>+</div></div><div class="answer" style="display:none;" data-v-a42299f2><div class="text" data-v-a42299f2></div><!----><div class="html" data-v-a42299f2><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Yes, trading XAUUSD carries risk. The level of that risk is largely determined by how you manage your position size, leverage, and stop-loss levels.</span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">XAUUSD trading carries 3 main risks:</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">1. Price volatility</span><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br>Gold prices can move significantly in a short period, particularly during US economic data releases, Federal Reserve decisions, and geopolitical events</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">2. Leverage risk</span><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br>Leverage amplifies both profits and losses. A small adverse price movement on a leveraged position can result in a loss larger than your deposited margin</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px;"><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">3. Emotional risk</span><span style="font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br>Gold&#39;s reputation as a safe-haven asset can lead traders to hold losing positions longer than their trading plan allows, compounding losses</span></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">The level of risk in XAUUSD trading is directly influenced by your position size, leverage ratio, and adherence to your trading plan. Traders who define their stop-loss levels and risk no more than 1% to 2% of their account per trade reduce their exposure to significant losses.</span></p></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div></div></div><!--]--></div><div data-v-a42299f2><!----></div></div></div><div class="author-box" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="info" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="logo" data-v-b8dc6f63><img onerror="this.setAttribute(&#39;data-error&#39;, 1)" data-nuxt-img srcset="https://tmgm-static.oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com/image/index/main-logo.webp 1x, https://tmgm-static.oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com/image/index/main-logo.webp 2x" class="img" src="https://tmgm-static.oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com/image/index/main-logo.webp" data-v-b8dc6f63></div><div class="text" data-v-b8dc6f63><a href="/en/analysis/our-expert-team/group/TMGM" class="title" data-v-b8dc6f63>TMGM</a><div class="name" data-v-b8dc6f63>Trade The World</div></div></div><div class="txt" data-v-b8dc6f63>The TMGM Academy and Market Insights Team is a collective of financial analysts and trading strategists. With access to real-time institutional data and over a decade of market operation, the team provides fact-based analysis on forex, gold, cryptocurrencies, stocks, commodities (like energies), and indices. Our content is strictly regulated, as outlined in our editorial policy page. TMGM adheres to ASIC and VFSC guidelines.</div></div><div class="img-card" data-v-b8dc6f63><div class="img-card" style="border-radius:30px;" data-v-b8dc6f63 data-v-efa2ec5a><img To get from account setup to your first live trade, follow these 9 steps.\n\nStart by understanding what XAUUSD trading is and what drives its price. Choose a regulated trading platform, open a funded account, and locate XAUUSD as your instrument. \n\nFrom there, identify the best time to trade, build a trading plan, and place your trade in the correct direction.\n\nOnce your trade is live, monitor your position and manage your risk until you are ready to close it.","\u003Cdiv style=\"font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;\">\u003Ch2 dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">1. Understand XAUUSD trading\u003C/span>\u003C/h2>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">XAUUSD trading is the \u003Ca href=\"/en/academy/trading-academy/what-is-gold-trading\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" style=\"text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;\">buying and selling of gold\u003C/a> priced in US dollars on the Forex market. XAU is the ISO currency code for gold. USD is the ISO currency code for the US dollar. The price of XAUUSD tells you how many US dollars it costs to buy one troy ounce of gold.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">When you trade XAUUSD, you are speculating on whether the price of gold will rise or fall against the US dollar. You do not own or receive any gold.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">The Your deposited funds cannot be used for the platform&#39;s own operations and remain protected if the platform faces financial difficulty.\u003C/p>\u003C/div>\u003C/div>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">2. XAUUSD spread\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Check the platform&#39;s advertised spread for XAUUSD before signing up, as a lower spread reduces your cost per trade.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">3.
