Some platforms label it as XAU/USD, Gold, or GOLD.USD. Search for &ldquo;gold&rdquo; instead if a search for &quot;XAUUSD&quot; returns no results.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Once XAUUSD is open on your chart, you are ready to research the best time to place your trade.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Ch2 dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">5. Identify the best XAUUSD trading time\u003C/span>\u003C/h2>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">The \u003Ca href=\"/en/academy/trading-academy/gold-trading-hours\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" style=\"text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;\">best time to trade XAUUSD\u003C/a> is between 13:00 and 17:00 UTC (08:00 to 12:00 EST). This is the overlap between the London and New York trading sessions, where gold trading volume and price volatility are at their highest. This four-hour window produces the tightest spreads and the largest price moves of the trading day, making it the most practical window for executing XAUUSD trades.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">XAUUSD trades 24 hours a day, five days a week. Activity levels vary across 3 main sessions, listed by importance to XAUUSD traders:\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Col style=\"margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;\">\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">London session\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">New York session\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Asian session\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003C/ol>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">1. London session (08:00 to 17:00 UTC / 03:00 to 12:00 EST)\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Activity increases as European traders enter the market, widening price ranges and increasing liquidity\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">2. New York session (13:00 to 22:00 UTC / 08:00 to 17:00 EST)\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>The most active session for XAUUSD, driven by US economic data releases and high institutional participation\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">3. Asian session (00:00 to 09:00 UTC / 19:00 to 04:00 EST)\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>The quietest period for XAUUSD, with lower volume and smaller price movements\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">XAUUSD is also sensitive to scheduled US economic releases, including the Non-Farm Payrolls report, CPI data, and Federal Reserve interest rate decisions. These events can cause sharp price movements outside of the standard overlap window and should be checked on an economic calendar before placing a trade.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Ch2 dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">6. Build your XAUUSD trading plan\u003C/span>\u003C/h2>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">A XAUUSD trading plan is a written set of rules that defines how you enter, manage, and exit gold trades while controlling risk and measuring performance over time.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">A structured XAUUSD trading plan removes emotional decision-making, improves discipline, and helps you maintain capital through consistent execution.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">A XAUUSD trading plan includes 7 components:\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Col style=\"margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;\">\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">1. Trading goals\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Define clear performance targets, such as monthly return objectives or maximum drawdown limits\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">2. Trading timeframe\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Specify whether you intend to trade XAUUSD intraday, over several days, or across longer-term trends. Your timeframe determines which price movements are relevant to your strategy\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">3. Trading strategy\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Define the setup criteria, indicators, and confirmation rules required before entering a XAUUSD trade, including the technical or fundamental conditions that must be present before you execute\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">4. Entry rules\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>State the exact conditions required to open a XAUUSD trade\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">5. Exit rules\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Define your stop-loss placement, take-profit levels, and trade management rules for open XAUUSD positions\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">6. Risk management rules\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Set your maximum risk per trade, position sizing formula, and total account risk exposure. A widely accepted guideline is to risk no more than 1&ndash;2% of your account balance per trade. On a $100 account, that means a maximum of $1&ndash;$2 at risk per trade. On a $1,000 account, that ceiling rises to $10&ndash;$20 per trade\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">7. Trading journal\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Document each XAUUSD trade and schedule regular performance reviews to identify strengths and weaknesses in your execution\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Ch2 dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">7. Open your XAUUSD trade\u003C/span>\u003C/h2>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Opening a XAUUSD trade means placing a buy or sell order on gold priced in US dollars through your broker&#39;s platform.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">There are 2 directions you can trade XAUUSD:\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cul style=\"margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;\">\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:disc;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Buy (long)\u003Cbr>\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">You buy XAUUSD if you expect the price of gold to rise against the US dollar.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:disc;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Sell (short)\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>You sell XAUUSD if you expect the price of gold to fall against the US dollar.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003C/ul>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Follow these 5 steps to open an XAUUSD trade:\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">1. Open the order panel\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>From your XAUUSD chart, click the buy or sell button to open the order entry window.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">2. Choose your order type\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Select a market order to execute at the current price, or a limit order to execute at a specific price you set in advance.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">3. Set your position size\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Enter your lot size based on the risk management rules in your trading pla\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family:Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">n. \u003Cspan style=\"font-family:Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">For example, with 1:10 leverage, a $200 margin controls a $2,000 gold position. The larger your position size, the greater your exposure to price movements in both directions.\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">4. Set your stop-loss and take-profit levels\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Enter your stop-loss and take-profit prices before confirming the trade.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">5. Confirm the order\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Review the order details and submit. Your trade is now live and will appear in your open positions.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Once the order is confirmed, your XAUUSD trade is active and will gain or lose value as the gold price moves.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Ch2 dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">8. Manage your XAUUSD trade\u003C/span>\u003C/h2>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Managing your XAUUSD trade means monitoring your open position and adjusting your risk controls as the gold price moves.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" overtrading\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003C/ol>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, Monitor the price\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Track the XAUUSD price against your entry point, stop-loss, and take-profit levels. Avoid making impulsive adjustments outside of your trading plan\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">2. Adjust your stop-loss\u003Cbr>\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Move your stop-loss in the direction of the trade if the price moves in your favour. This locks in profit and reduces the risk of a winning trade turning into a loss\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">3. Watch economic events\u003Cbr>\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Check your economic calendar for scheduled US data releases that can cause sharp XAUUSD price movements. High-impact events such as CPI releases and Federal Reserve decisions can shift gold prices quickly\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">4. Avoid overtrading\u003Cbr>\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Do not open additional XAUUSD positions to recover losses from an open trade. Each trade should meet the entry criteria in your trading plan independently\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Managing a XAUUSD trade is not the same as interfering with it. If the trade is within your plan parameters, no action is required until your stop-loss or take-profit level is reached.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Ch2 dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.656;margin-top:24pt;margin-bottom:6pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18pt;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#001489;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">9. Close your XAUUSD trade\u003C/span>\u003C/h2>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Closing your XAUUSD trade means exiting your open position and settling the profit or loss from that trade in your account.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">There are 3 ways to close a XAUUSD trade:\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Col style=\"margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;\">\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:0pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Take-profit trigger\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Stop-loss trigger\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003Cli dir=\"ltr\" style=\"list-style-type:decimal;font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;\">\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">Manual close\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/li>\u003C/ol>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">1. Take-profit trigger\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Your trade closes automatically when the price reaches the take-profit level you set at entry\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">2. Stop-loss trigger\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Your trade closes automatically when the price reaches your stop-loss level, limiting your loss on that trade\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">3. Manual close\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>You close the trade yourself through the order panel before either level is reached\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size:18px;font-family:Poppins, sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;\">After closing a XAUUSD trade, record the trade details in your trading journal. Note the entry price, exit price, position size, and outcome. This supports the performance review process in your trading plan and helps identify patterns in your execution over time.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cdiv style=\"margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center;\">\u003Cp style=\"font-size: 1.1em; color: #333; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 20px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Trade XAUUSD with TMGM worry-free.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Ca href=\"https://portal.tmgm.com/register\" style=\"display: inline-block; background-color: #2969b0; color: #ffffff; padding: 15px 40px; font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 50px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(41, 105, 176, 0.4); transition: transform 0.2s;\" target=\"_blank\">Open an XAUUSD trading account\u003C/a>\u003Cp style=\"margin-top: 15px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #888;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Or \u003Ca href=\"https://portal.tmgm.com/register?register_type=demo\" style=\"color: #2969b0; text-decoration: underline;\" target=\"_blank\">try our free demo account\u003C/a> (no deposit required).\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003C/div>\u003Cdiv style=\"margin: 1.5rem 0 3rem 0; border-top: 1px solid #eee; padding-top: 20px; font-size: 0.85em; color: #999; text-align: center;\">TMGM is regulated by ASIC, VFSC, FSA, and FSC. Client funds are held in segregated accounts.\u003C/div>\u003C/div>",null,1,16,"2026-03-06 13:52:00","2026-03-09 00:23:11",[],[19],"Gold",[21],11,[],[],"how-to-trade-gold-in-forex","9 Steps to Trade Gold (XAUUSD) in Forex: Beginner's Guide",{"list":27,"title":43},[28,31,34,37,40],{"text":29,"title":30},"\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:10pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">XAUUSD is the Forex market symbol for spot gold priced in US dollars. It is the label used to identify and trade the live gold spot rate against the US dollar on the foreign exchange market, quoted as US dollars per troy ounce.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:10pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">In \u003Ca href=\"/en/academy/trading-academy/what-is-forex-trading\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" style=\"text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;\">Forex trading\u003C/a>, XAUUSD sits alongside major currency pairs such as EURUSD and GBPUSD, following the same order types, margin requirements, and trade execution rules. It is one of the most actively traded instruments in the Forex market, valued for its liquidity and sensitivity to global economic events.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>","What is XAUUSD in Forex?",{"text":32,"title":33},"\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">Gold is traded as a currency pair in Forex because it is priced globally in US dollars. Since gold has a direct exchange rate with the dollar, Forex platforms quote it the same way they quote one currency against another.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">This structure has 3 practical reasons:\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">1. Global dollar pricing\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Gold is bought and sold in US dollars across international markets, making the dollar the natural base for quoting its price\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">2. Historical classification\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Gold held monetary status for most of the 20th century under the Bretton Woods system, where major currencies were pegged to its value. That relationship established gold as a currency-like asset, a classification that carried into modern Forex markets\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">3. Standardised trading infrastructure\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Quoting gold as a currency pair allows brokers to apply the same margin, leverage, and order execution rules used for all other Forex instruments, simplifying access for traders\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">Trading gold as a currency pair also means its price is directly affected by US dollar strength. When the dollar strengthens, XAUUSD falls. When the dollar weakens, XAUUSD rises. This inverse relationship is a defining characteristic of gold in the Forex market.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>","Why is gold traded as a currency pair in Forex?",{"text":35,"title":36},"\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">1 XAUUSD represents the price of one troy ounce of gold in US dollars. The exact price changes continuously during market hours as gold is bought and sold globally.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">The price of XAUUSD is influenced by US dollar strength, interest rates, and global demand for gold. Tracking the \u003Ca href=\"/en/trading/instrument/xauusd\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" style=\"text-decoration: underline;color:#2969b0;\">live gold spot price\u003C/a> helps you identify where the market is trading relative to recent highs and lows before placing a trade.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>","How much is 1 XAUUSD?",{"text":38,"title":39},"\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">Yes, you can trade XAUUSD with $100. Many XAUUSD trading platforms set minimum deposit requirements at or below $100, giving you access to the gold market with a small amount of starting capital.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">Once your account is funded, leverage allows your $100 deposit to control a XAUUSD position larger than your account balance. For example, with 1:50 leverage, a $100 deposit controls a $5,000 gold position. This means a small amount of capital can generate meaningful exposure to gold price movements.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>","Can I trade XAUUSD with $100?",{"text":41,"title":42},"\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">Yes, trading XAUUSD carries risk. The level of that risk is largely determined by how you manage your position size, leverage, and stop-loss levels.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">XAUUSD trading carries 3 main risks:\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">1. Price volatility\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Gold prices can move significantly in a short period, particularly during US economic data releases, Federal Reserve decisions, and geopolitical events\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">2. Leverage risk\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Leverage amplifies both profits and losses. A small adverse price movement on a leveraged position can result in a loss larger than your deposited margin\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">3. Emotional risk\u003C/span>\u003Cspan style=\"font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">\u003Cbr>Gold&#39;s reputation as a safe-haven asset can lead traders to hold losing positions longer than their trading plan allows, compounding losses\u003C/span>\u003C/span>\u003C/p>\u003Cp dir=\"ltr\" style=\"line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;\">\u003Cspan style=\"font-size: 18px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;\">The level of risk in XAUUSD trading is directly influenced by your position size, leverage ratio, and adherence to your trading plan. Traders who define their stop-loss levels and risk no more than 1% to 2% of their account per trade reduce their exposure to significant losses.\u003C/span>\u003C/p>","Is trading XAUUSD risky?","XAUUSD Trading FAQs",[],false,[],[],[],{"code":50,"message":51},500,"URL not found",["Reactive",53],{"$si18n:cached-locale-configs":54,"$si18n:resolved-locale":98},{"en":55,"zh-hans":58,"eng":60,"cht":62,"en-nz":64,"zh-hant-nz":66,"zh-hans-nz":68,"zh-hant":70,"pt":72,"id":74,"en-in":76,"it":78,"th":80,"vi":82,"ms":84,"tl":86,"fr":88,"ko":90,"de":92,"en-eu":94,"ar":96},{"fallbacks":56,"cacheable":57},[],true,{"fallbacks":59,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":61,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":63,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":65,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":67,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":69,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":71,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":73,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":75,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":77,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":79,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":81,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":83,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":85,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":87,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":89,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":91,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":93,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":95,"cacheable":57},[],{"fallbacks":97,"cacheable":57},[],"",["Set"],["ShallowReactive",101],{"sxjt6u0N6A":12,"igzXFgSQUI":12},"/en/academy/trading-academy/how-to-trade-gold-in-forex"]</script>
